name: JellyPlug Cache Headers
description: Adds ETag + Cache-Control to /Branding/Css and /JavaScriptInjector/public.js so repeat loads revalidate cheaply (304) instead of refetching ~800 KB in full.
overview: Makes JellyPlug's heavy CSS/JS assets cacheable so the app loads fast on reload.

versions.changelog: 1.0.0.0 (JEL-659): stamp ETag + Cache-Control on the two uncached JellyPlug assets and answer conditional GETs with 304.
